# Preprompt 2

This second preprompt complements the first by giving more detailed instructions on workflow and verification.

- When planning tasks, always write them into a `plan.md` with checkboxes.
- Confirm each action sequentially by checking off tasks in the plan.
- Whenever UI changes are made (even trivial), use `web-devtools` MCP and take a screenshot.
- For any new file or structural work, describe reason and ensure linting/formatting rules are satisfied.

Together with `preprompt1.txt`, this file constitutes the two preprompt documents for our session.
